DescribeJobWebterminal.resourcePoolId: For self-managed resource pools, pass the unique resource pool identifier (e.g., cce-1uji3ib5); for managed resource pools, pass aihc-serverless
DescribeJobWebterminal.queueID: The queue to which the training job belongs; for self-managed resource pools, enter the queue name; for managed resource pools, enter the queue ID
DescribeJobWebterminal.handshakeTimeoutSecond: Connection timeout parameter, used only during connection establishment, in seconds, default 30, minimum 1
DescribeJobWebterminal.pingTimeoutSecond: Heartbeat timeout parameter, in seconds, default 900, minimum 1, maximum 3600
